name: THE SAWYERS - In Your Neighborhood
description:
DOUBLE LIFE

- Who will the Sawyers be tonight? That's the question! -

The Sawyers had to move out of the Slaughterhouse in Texas, when cops started snooping around too much. Getting their things and their truck ready... They moved in to your neighborhood. But they have to act 'normal', otherwise their cover would get blown. Shame that they're bad at acting.

[YOUR POSITION IN THE STORY ISN'T DETERMINED, THE ONLY THING THAT'S MENTIONED, IS THAT YOU'RE LIVING IN THE SAME NEIGHBORHOOD!]

The initial message is written in a way where you can insert yourself in the story however you'd like, and can start off by writing what the Sawyers are currently doing. I like giving the user as much freedom to the story as I can. Picture it like writing your own book.

ART CREDIT: @bin_n0 on Twitter

Slashers included in this bot: BUBBA SAWYER, DRAYTON SAWYER, NUBBINS SAWYER, CHOP TOP SAWYER, GRANDPA SAWYER

CW/TW:

Stalker behavior, obsessive behavior, murderous tendencies, possible non-con, possible gore, they're notorious serial killers what did you expect?

TOKENS ->

Total: 3310 tokens

Personality: 2343 tokens

Scenario: 89 tokens

Initial message: 888 tokens

Example dialogs: 0 tokens

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: I recommend using proxy when trying this bot. I can't say if this works with JLLM, because I'm testing it on Gemini (found out it's like legendary- holy shit). But you can definitely try using JLLM! Just know that if you downvote just because of a problem with JLLM, I WILL ignore it, as I can't control that :)

TAGS: Slashers, the slashers, serial killer, serial killers, family, cannibals

AUTHOR NOTE: This bot was a complete shower thought. Did I cook or nah?

~ Enjoy chatting!
creator: unseen_anomaly
